content:
500 XP
Can bypass one required Skill Check per unit & gains the “Codex of Lost Knowledge” item (grants 1 free reroll per semester).


📜 How Students Track Their XP & Evolution
✔ Displayed weekly on a class leaderboard.
✔ Players must manually report Skill Check completions to track their XP.
✔ Final evolutions happen after Week 10—ensuring long-term investment.

✅ Why This Works:
• Adds RPG-like progression, ensuring engagement throughout the course.
• Prevents overpowered characters early on.
• Encourages students to strategize their path based on their archetype.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 198 (chunk 198/555)
